regularTemplates.body:
Dear [MP_NAME],

As I am writing to you with respect to the situation in Iran where the Islamic Republic government has committed crimes against humanity, murdered upwards of 16,000 people on January 8, 2026 and January 9, 2026, and is continuing its killings behind closed doors with or without illegal and summary trials. After a week-long complete internet shutdown, some Iranians have managed to get intermittent access to the heavily-restricted internet and images of the abhorrent crimes of the Islamic Republic regime are slowly starting to emerge. The regime will continue its killings as it has in the last 47 years unless the international community including the Government of Canada stands with the people of Iran and takes meaningful action. 

As a Member of the Parliament of Canada, a country that is home to one of the largest communities of the Iranian diaspora in the world, with highly educated immigrants that significantly contribute to Canada and its economy, the role of your office extends far beyond the Canadian borders. We ask that you speak up at the Parliament about the actions that Canada must take to put an end to the Islamic Republic’s crimes and hold the Government of Iran and its officials including those in Canada accountable. We also ask that you refrain from speaking to the lobbyists of the Islamic Republic - they are easy to identify: any group or person that advocates for reform in Iran instead of regime change is a lobbyist for the Islamic Republic and is complicit in its crimes. 

Canada has allowed many children and families of the corrupt Iranian officials tied to and affiliated with the Islamic Republic into the country. We ask that the Parliament takes steps to identify and freeze their assets, including but not limited to passing new legislation which would facilitate these asset freezes.   

More lives are on the line and time is of the essence. Any delay in taking action directly translates to more loss of life. A revolution is underway and we need your support. Stand with us. 

Sincerely,

primeMinisterTemplate.body:
Dear Prime Minister Carney,

As I am writing to you with respect to the situation in Iran where the Islamic Republic government has committed crimes against humanity, murdered upwards of 16,000 people on January 8, 2026 and January 9, 2026, and is continuing its killings behind closed doors with or without illegal and summary trials. After a week-long complete internet shutdown, some Iranians have managed to get intermittent access to the heavily-restricted internet and images of the abhorrent crimes of the Islamic Republic regime are slowly starting to emerge. The regime will continue its killings as it has in the last 47 years unless the international community including the Government of Canada stands with the people of Iran and takes meaningful action. 

As a Member of the Parliament of Canada, a country that is home to one of the largest communities of the Iranian diaspora in the world, with highly educated immigrants that significantly contribute to Canada and its economy, the role of your office extends far beyond the Canadian borders. We ask that you speak up at the Parliament about the actions that Canada must take to put an end to the Islamic Republic’s crimes and hold the Government of Iran and its officials including those in Canada accountable. We also ask that you refrain from speaking to the lobbyists of the Islamic Republic - they are easy to identify: any group or person that advocates for reform in Iran instead of regime change is a lobbyist for the Islamic Republic and is complicit in its crimes. 

Canada has allowed many children and families of the corrupt Iranian officials tied to and affiliated with the Islamic Republic into the country. We ask that the Parliament takes steps to identify and freeze their assets, including but not limited to passing new legislation which would facilitate these asset freezes.   

More lives are on the line and time is of the essence. Any delay in taking action directly translates to more loss of life. A revolution is underway and we need your support. Stand with us. 



[CONSTITUENCY_INFO]

Sincerely,

frenchTemplates.body:
Cher/Chère [MP_NAME],

Je vous écris au sujet de la situation en Iran, où le gouvernement de la République islamique a commis des crimes contre l’humanité, a assassiné plus de 16 000 personnes les 8 et 9 janvier 2026, et poursuit ses exécutions à huis clos, avec ou sans procès illégaux et expéditifs. Après une coupure totale d’Internet pendant une semaine, certains Iraniens ont réussi à obtenir un accès intermittent à un Internet fortement restreint, et des images des crimes abjects du régime de la République islamique commencent lentement à émerger. Le régime continuera ses massacres, comme il l’a fait au cours des 47 dernières années, à moins que la communauté internationale, y compris le gouvernement du Canada, ne se tienne aux côtés du peuple iranien et ne prenne des mesures concrètes.

En tant que membre du Parlement du Canada — un pays qui accueille l’une des plus importantes communautés de la diaspora iranienne au monde, composée d’immigrants hautement instruits qui contribuent de manière significative au Canada et à son économie —, le rôle de votre bureau dépasse largement les frontières canadiennes. Nous vous demandons de prendre la parole au Parlement sur les mesures que le Canada doit adopter pour mettre fin aux crimes de la République islamique et tenir le gouvernement iranien ainsi que ses responsables, y compris ceux présents au Canada, responsables de leurs actes. Nous vous demandons également de vous abstenir de dialoguer avec les lobbyistes de la République islamique — ils sont faciles à identifier : tout groupe ou individu qui plaide en faveur de réformes en Iran plutôt que d’un changement de régime est un lobbyiste de la République islamique et se rend complice de ses crimes.

Le Canada a autorisé de nombreux enfants et familles de responsables iraniens corrompus liés ou affiliés à la République islamique à entrer dans le pays. Nous demandons au Parlement de prendre des mesures pour identifier et geler leurs avoirs, notamment en adoptant de nouvelles lois qui faciliteraient ces gels d’actifs.

Des vies sont en jeu et le temps presse. Tout retard dans l’action se traduit directement par davantage de pertes humaines. Une révolution est en cours et nous avons besoin de votre soutien. Tenez-vous à nos côtés.

[CONSTITUENCY_INFO]

Sincèrement,
